author: anon-13168fa2
content: Plan: Four changes. (1) README: Rework projects table to map clearly to phases. (2) README: Add 'why this project' rationale to each guided build. (3) Portfolio Review chapter: Rewrite audience section to be honest about credential timeline - where it is now vs where it's going. (4) Portfolio Review chapter: Make the review process concrete - who evaluates, how, what the rubric is.
